dawn.com.name: Dawn News
dawn.com.notes: Pakistan's oldest and most respected English-language newspaper, established 1947

thenews.com.pk.name: The News International
thenews.com.pk.notes: Part of Jang Group, Pakistan's largest media conglomerate

tribune.com.pk.name: Express Tribune
tribune.com.pk.notes: International Herald Tribune partnership, strong editorial standards

geo.tv.name: Geo News
geo.tv.notes: Pakistan's largest TV channel, large reach but occasionally sensational

arynews.tv.name: ARY News
arynews.tv.notes: Pro-PTI bias documented by media researchers

samaa.tv.name: Samaa TV
samaa.tv.notes: Breaking news focused, commercial pressures affect editorial

bolnews.com.name: Bol News
bolnews.com.notes: Background controversy with Axact scandal; partial rehabilitation

dunyanews.tv.name: Dunya News
dunyanews.tv.notes: Owned by Lakson Group, generally moderate

jang.com.pk.name: Jang
jang.com.pk.notes: Pakistan's largest Urdu daily by circulation

urdupoint.com.name: Urdu Point
urdupoint.com.notes: Aggregator and news portal, mixed sourcing

propakistani.pk.name: ProPakistani
propakistani.pk.notes: Tech and business news, generally factual

bbc.com.name: BBC
bbc.com.notes: International public broadcaster with editorial independence

aljazeera.com.name: Al Jazeera
aljazeera.com.notes: Qatar-funded but editorially independent; strong South Asia coverage

theguardian.com.name: The Guardian
theguardian.com.notes: UK broadsheet with South Asia desk

theprint.in.name: The Print (India)
theprint.in.notes: Indian digital news outlet with Pakistan coverage

ndtv.com.name: NDTV
ndtv.com.notes: Indian broadcaster, coverage of Pakistan may reflect Indian perspective

voanews.com.name: Voice of America
voanews.com.notes: US government-funded international broadcaster, factual standards

rferl.org.name: Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty
rferl.org.notes: US-funded, covers South and Central Asia
